search.noResultsBody: We couldn’t find a match — but it’s never a dead end. Try one of these popular categories, or browse by city.

footer.tagline: Japan’s local business directory. Discover, review, and connect with businesses across every prefecture — in English and 日本語.
footer.copyright: © {year} NihonPages. Independent directory. Not affiliated with any government body.
footer.madeIn: Made in Japan · データは参考情報です

cookie.text: We use only essential cookies by default. Optional analytics cookies help us improve the directory — they stay off unless you accept.

badges.verifiedAdminTip: Ownership documents checked by our team.
badges.verifiedCommunityTip: Confirmed by contributor reports and open data.

home.heroTitle: Find the right local business, anywhere in Japan.
home.heroSubtitle: Restaurants, clinics, contractors, shops and more — with real reviews, verified profiles, and opening hours you can trust.
home.launchPromo: Launch promotion: 50% off every plan. Pick a plan and your listing goes live after a quick human review.
home.dataHubTitle: Every company. One clean table. No ads.
home.dataHubBody: Search, filter and export the full company database through a fast, dense table built for B2B teams — advanced filters, saved searches, and CSV export with clear monthly quotas.

category.noMatchesBody: Try removing a filter, or explore a nearby city.

location.intro: {count} businesses listed in {city}, {prefecture}. Filter by category, rating or opening hours to find exactly what you need.

cities.title: Browse by city
cities.subtitle: {cityCount} cities across {prefCount} prefectures, grouped the way Japan is — by 都道府県.

browse.title: Browse categories
browse.subtitle: Every category is colour-coded by group — the same tab colours you see across the site. Pick a group tab or search to narrow down.

company.askIntro: Ask the owner or the community a question about {name}.
company.signInToAsk: Sign in to ask a question
company.noQuestions: No questions yet — be the first to ask.
company.requestQuoteBody: Send {name} a quick brief and get a price estimate.
company.reviewPlaceholder: Share what your visit was like — what stood out, and who it’s good for.
company.minChars: Minimum 10 characters. Reviews are human-approved before publishing.
company.signInToReview: Sign in to write a review — your account keeps your review history.
company.thanksTitle: Thanks — your review was submitted for review.
company.thanksBody: Every review is checked by a human before it’s published (usually within 24 hours). We’ll email you when it’s live.
company.receiptVerifiedTip: Reviewer uploaded a receipt; weighted higher in the average.
